summarization.a: The heatmap shows how the mapped value varies with TMA flow rate and substrate velocity. Most of the field remains at low values across the parameter space. Only a slight increase appears at high substrate velocity and high TMA flow rate, indicating a weak dependence on both parameters.

a.question: Does the heatmap show a strong dependence on TMA flow rate?
How does the mapped value vary across TMA flow rate and substrate velocity?
a.answer: The mapped value stays low over most of the heatmap. Only a small increase is visible at high substrate velocities combined with high TMA flow rates. This suggests that neither parameter strongly affects the value within most of the explored range.

a.question: Which two variables are shown on the axes of the heatmap?
a.answer: TMA flow rate and substrate velocity.

a.question: In which region does a slight increase in value appear?
a.answer: At high substrate velocity and high TMA flow rate.
